mapper.sql: id, parent_id, dept_name, order_num, leader, phone, email, status, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_dept WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_dept WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY order_num ASC
SELECT FROM sys_dept WHERE deleted = 0 AND dept_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') AND status = #{status} ORDER BY order_num ASC
SELECT FROM sys_dept WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY order_num ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dept (parent_id, dept_name, order_num, leader, phone, email, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{deptName}, #{orderNum}, #{leader}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dept SET parent_id=#{parentId}, dept_name=#{deptName}, order_num=#{orderNum}, leader=#{leader}, phone=#{phone}, email=#{email}, status=#{status}, update_time=#{updateTime} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE sys_dept SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_dept SET deleted = 1 WHERE id IN #{id}
